m3u.subtitle: {games, plural, one {1 game} other {# games}} · {systems, plural, one {1 system} other {# systems}} · {missing, plural, =0 {all .m3u present} one {1 missing} other {# missing}}

m3u.noGames: No multi-disc games detected. Sync your collection first.

collection.title: Collection
collection.subtitle: {games} · {favorites} · {neverPlayed} · {systems}
collection.gamesCount: {count, plural, =0 {No games} one {1 game} other {# games}}
collection.favoritesCount: {count, plural, =0 {No favorites} one {1 favorite} other {# favorites}}
collection.neverPlayedCount: {count, plural, =0 {None never played} one {1 never played} other {# never played}}
collection.systemsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No systems} one {1 system} other {# systems}}
collection.noGames: No games found. Sync from your Recalbox.
collection.totalGames: {count, plural, =0 {No games} one {1 game} other {# games}}

sync.done: {count, plural, one {1 game} other {# games}} synced in {seconds}s

launch.busy: A game is already running ({name}) — quit it first.

heatmap.empty: Play some games to see your activity

topGames.empty: No games played in this period

streak.record: Record: {days, plural, one {1 day} other {# days}}

recalbox.passwordWarning: SSH password is stored in plaintext. This dashboard is designed for trusted local networks only.
recalbox.sshPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password

scrobble.cardDescription: Control how game sessions are recorded
scrobble.minDurationHint: Sessions shorter than this are discarded
scrobble.maxDurationHint: Orphan sessions are capped at this duration
scrobble.orphanRecoveryHint: Sessions older than this without an end event are considered orphans

retroachievements.cardDescription: Unlock tracking and achievement progress for your games
retroachievements.enabledHint: Track achievement progress across your game library
retroachievements.usernameHint: Auto-filled from your Recalbox config — click 🔄 to refresh
retroachievements.autoSyncHint: How often to sync achievement data in the background
retroachievements.testFailed: Connection failed — check your username and API key

integrations.cardDescription: Connect the dashboard to Super Retrogamers encyclopedia
integrations.enabledHint: Show links and preview cards for games that have a page on Super Retrogamers
integrations.apiUrlHint: Override the default Super Retrogamers API endpoint

mqttPublish.cardDescription: Publish analytics to MQTT for Home Assistant and other tools
mqttPublish.enabledHint: Publish playtime, streak, and session stats to MQTT topics
mqttPublish.brokerUrlHint: Leave blank to use the Recalbox broker automatically
mqttPublish.topicPrefixHint: All topics are published under this prefix
mqttPublish.haDiscoveryHint: Auto-register sensors in Home Assistant via MQTT Discovery

notificationsTab.cardDescription: Manage how and when you receive notifications.
notificationsTab.vapidUnavailable: VAPID keys not initialized — restart the scrobbler
notificationsTab.regenerateConfirm: This will disconnect all devices. Continue?
notificationsTab.regenerated: VAPID keys regenerated — all devices disconnected

app.iosInstructions: Open in Safari → tap Share (□↑) → Add to Home Screen
app.androidInstructions: Open in Chrome → tap menu (⋮) → Add to Home Screen
app.desktopInstructions: Click the install icon (⊕) in the address bar
app.webPushNote: Web Push notifications on iOS require the app to be installed as a PWA.

igdb.description: IGDB improves recommendations by leveraging similar games calculated by its community. Requires a free Twitch developer account. Recommendations still work without IGDB.
igdb.credentialsStep5: Get the Client ID, generate a Client Secret
igdb.totalCollection: Total collection: {count} games. Only played games are matched by default.
igdb.matchPlayedHint: Only matches games already played (sessions, history, favorites).
igdb.matchAllHint: Starts matching on all {count} games. Very slow for large collections. Not necessary — prefer on-demand matching.

igdbReview.title: Review IGDB matches
igdbReview.subtitle: These matches have low confidence. Confirm or reject them.
igdbReview.allGood: No matches to review. Everything is in order.
igdbReview.pendingTitle: {count, plural, one {1 match to review} other {# matches to review}}

hltb.description: Imports official game durations from HowLongToBeat to refine "Finish a game" recommendations based on available time.

achievements.title: RetroAchievements
achievements.notConfigured: RetroAchievements is not configured. Enable it in Settings to track your achievement progress.

welcome.title: Welcome to Recalbox Dashboard
welcome.subtitle: Let's get you set up in a few steps

step1.title: Recalbox Connection
step1.description: Enter the network details of your Recalbox console

step2.title: Test Connection
step2.description: Verifying SSH and MQTT connectivity to your Recalbox
step2.sshFailed: SSH failed: check host, port, credentials. Default password is recalboxroot.
step2.mqttFailed: MQTT failed: check that the MQTT broker is enabled in Recalbox settings.

step3.title: All set!
step3.descriptionOk: Connection successful. Your dashboard is ready.
step3.descriptionPartial: You can complete setup now and fix any connection issues later in Settings.

notifications.cardDescription: Manage how and when you receive notifications.
notifications.vapidUnavailable: VAPID keys not initialized — restart the scrobbler
notifications.regenerateConfirm: This will disconnect all devices. Continue?
notifications.regenerated: VAPID keys regenerated — all devices disconnected

power.confirmShutdownDescription: The console will power off. You will need to turn it back on manually.
power.confirmRebootDescription: The console will restart. This will interrupt any ongoing session.

preview.notFound: No page found on Super Retrogamers
preview.stale: Cached data — Super Retrogamers is unreachable

noData.title: No sessions in {year}
noData.subtitle: Play some games and come back!

statsBanner.text: Your {year} Wrapped is taking shape — {duration} · {topGame} in the lead

installBanner.title: Install Recalbox Dashboard
installBanner.description: Add to your home screen for the best experience.
installBanner.iosInstructions: Tap Share (□↑) then "Add to Home Screen"

update.title: Update available
update.description: A new version of the app is ready.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: Check your connection and try again.

edit.title: Edit {name}
edit.deleteConfirm: Delete this Recalbox? This cannot be undone.

scraping.label: Scraped
scraping.gamesWithoutMedia: {count} of {total} games missing cover or description

patron.invalidKey: Your Patron key seems missing or invalid. If you are a Patron, re-enter it via the Recalbox Web Manager:

recommendation.withPatron: {count, plural, one {1 game} other {# games}} to scrape. As a Patron, use the scraper in EmulationStation (Menu → Scraper) — you’ll use Recalbox servers, much faster than ScreenScraper.
recommendation.withoutPatron: {count, plural, one {1 game} other {# games}} to scrape. Launch the scraper from EmulationStation (Menu → Scraper).

playTonight.title: What to play tonight?
playTonight.subtitle: Pick your mood and how much time you have — I'll handle the rest.

results.emptyHint: Try a different time/mood, or play more to build your profile.
results.launchError: Could not launch the game on your Recalbox.
results.launchBusy: A game is already running ({name}) — quit it first.

reasons.similarToFavorite: Similar to a game you love

maturityBanner.message: Profile at {pct}% — play more for better recommendations.

algoStatus.title: Where is your algorithm at?
algoStatus.maturityHint: Based on {count} significant session(s). 50 sessions = mature profile.

sessions.title: Your play sessions
sessions.desc: What you play, how long, how often. Recent sessions weigh more than older ones.

comfortGames.title: Your comfort games
comfortGames.desc: Games you return to often and play the longest. The algorithm suggests similar games.

feedback.title: Your post-session feedback
feedback.desc: Post-session feedback counts a lot. A 'love' doubles the weight, a 'dislike' stops recommendations.

igdb.title: IGDB (similar games)
igdb.desc: For your comfort games, we fetch what the IGDB community also enjoyed, then look for matches in your collection.

mood.title: Mood and available time
mood.desc: The only two inputs you provide. They shape recommendations without changing your core profile.

high.desc: Strongly aligned with your tastes (or IGDB-boosted). Probably a good pick.

medium.desc: Several signals converge without being very strong. Give it a shot.

exploration.desc: Intentionally outside your usual habits. The algorithm plays for variety.

tips.title: How to improve my recommendations?
tips.play: Play. Your profile is inferred from real sessions, not a questionnaire.
tips.feedback: Respond to post-session prompts (one click, very strong signal).
tips.skip: Skip games you're not interested in (✕ button = 7 days without reappearing).
tips.igdb: Enable IGDB in <link>settings</link> for community-based recommendations.

profile.title: Your gamer profile
profile.subtitle: Inferred automatically from your sessions. Updated on {date}.
profile.maturityYoung: Young profile: play more to improve recommendations.
profile.maturityBuilding: Profile growing: recommendations are getting sharper.
profile.sessions: {count, plural, one {1 significant session} other {# significant sessions}}
profile.comfortGamesDesc: Games you return to most often and play the longest
profile.bouncersDesc: Games you launch but quit quickly — the algorithm will avoid suggesting them

bios.title: BIOS
bios.subtitle: Check your BIOS files against the expected checksums.
bios.error: Could not read BIOS information from the Recalbox.
